mapper.sql: id, employee_id, attendance_date, check_in_time, check_out_time, status, remark, create_time, update_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO emp_attendance (employee_id, attendance_date, check_in_time, check_out_time, status, remark, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{employeeId}, #{attendanceDate}, #{checkInTime}, #{checkOutTime}, #{status}, #{remark}, NOW(), NOW())
